title: Here are the qualifying times for the 2026 Boston Marathon
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Boston Marathon Qualifying for the Boston Marathon is more competitive than ever, with the BAA making qualifying times faster than before.
Participants compete in the 129th Boston Marathon.
Brett Phelps/The Boston Globe By Carson Lyle April 16, 2026 | 5:00 AM 1 minute to read The Boston Athletic Association said it received 33,267 qualifying applications for the 130th Boston Marathon.

title: Celtics to face Philadelphia 76ers in first round of NBA playoffs

title: Don’t want an $80 train ticket to the World Cup? How about a $95 bus ticket?
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: World Cup World Cup officials have launched the Boston Stadium Express Bus Service, a convenient but pricey option for match attendees.
World Cup organizers are offering a premium bus service to Boston Stadium, with a premium price to match.
Danielle Parhizkaran/The Boston Globe FIFA World Cup organizers have announced that bus service will be available in Massachusetts during this summer’s match days — but it comes at a premium price.

title: Plum Island’s iconic Pink House, demolished last year, memorialized with new sign
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Local News With an artist's rendering, the new sign reads “honoring 100 years of memories.
Demolished March 11, 2025, but never forgotten.
” The Pink House in 2025.

title: Here’s how the city commemorated the 13th anniversary of the Boston Marathon bombing
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Boston Marathon In the days leading up to this year’s Boston Marathon, several service opportunities for volunteers will be available citywide.
Denise and Bill Richard walk past a Boston Marathon photo mural on a Boylston Street building.
John Tlumacki/The Boston Globe Boston was forever changed 13 years ago when two bombs went off at the finish line of the 117th Boston Marathon.

title: Brockton man charged with motor vehicle homicide, OUI in crash that killed 2
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Crime Mario Hernandez, 32, faces multiple charges in connection with a car crash that killed two people last November, the DA said.
ShareSend this article to your social connections.
A Brockton man was ordered held on bail on charges connected to a November crash that killed two people, prosecutors announced.

title: The other side of the story: This liver donor is running the 2026 Boston Marathon
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Boston Marathon "Life after donation isn’t about what you can no longer do — it’s about what’s still possible, and sometimes even discovering new challenges you never imagined taking on," Neal said.
Amanda Neal is running the 2026 Boston Marathon.
Amanda Neal In our “Why I’m Running” series, Boston Marathon athletes share what’s inspiring them to make the 26.

title: Services at Brockton hospital return to normal more than a week after cyberattack
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Local News The cybersecurity incident prompted the hospital to declare a “code black,” resulting in diverted ambulances and paused operations.
Signature Healthcare Brockton Hospital is resuming operations after it faced a cybersecurity attack last week.
Pat Greenhouse/The Boston Globe A Brockton hospital is resuming normal operations after a cybersecurity incident earlier this month caused it to temporarily shut down some services.

title: New Trader Joe’s location coming to the South Shore
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News “It was the worst kept secret,” Mark Carey, media director for Mayor Tom Koch and the city of Quincy, said.
The exterior of a Trader Joe’s location on Boylston Street in Boston.
John Tlumacki/The Boston Globe By Carson Lyle April 15, 2026 | 7:56 PM 1 minute to read A new Trader Joe’s location is coming to the South Shore … in 2027.

title: Here is the Celtics’ first round playoff schedule
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Boston Celtics The times and dates for the entire first round are now available.
Jaylen Brown Danielle Parhizkaran/The Boston Globe The Celtics’ first round playoff schedule has been released.
The action tips off Sunday at TD Garden against either Orlando or Philadelphia.
